<thought>
I am at row02 column B, facing right. The goal is at row04 column D. I need to move forward to cell (2,C) which is empty, then continue forward to (2,D), then turn clockwise to face down, then go forward to (3,D) and finally to (4,D). So my next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row02 column C, facing right. The next cell forward is row02 column D, which is empty. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at row04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row02 column D, facing right. The next cell forward is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. I need to face down to go towards the goal at row04 column D. Turning clockwise will change my orientation from right to down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down at row02 column D. The cell directly ahead is row03 column D, which is empty floor (.). Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at row04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row03 column D, facing down. The cell directly ahead is row04 column D, which is the goal (O). I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
